articles.title: Navigating the Mobile App Inbox
articles.body:
The Inbox in the Hi Marley mobile app helps you manage your cases more effectively by organizing conversations and giving you powerful search, filter, and sort options.

 

Viewing Cases

  • Scroll through your Inbox to view all the active cases assigned to you.
  • Each case displays a preview of the most recent message.
  • Indicators:
    • A red dot means the message is unread.
    • A gray arrow shows whether the last message was sent or received.

 

Searching for a Case

Tap the Search icon to quickly find a specific case by:

  • Customer Name
  • Phone Number
  • Case Number

 

Using Inbox Filters

  • Tap Inbox Filters to modify which Hi Marley cases are displayed in your inbox.
    • For example, you can filter to view only unread messages or cases where you’re collaborating with other operators.

 

Sorting Cases

  • Sorting helps you prioritize your caseload. Options include sorting by:
    • Smart Sort, which prioritizes cases based on tags, such as the Needs Attention tag.

Pinning Cases

  • You can pin important cases to keep them at the top of your inbox for easy access.
  • Tap the thumbtack icon on a chat to pin it.

Explore Your Inbox Today!

With the Hi Marley mobile app’s enhanced inbox, managing your caseload is easier than ever. Whether you’re filtering unread messages, searching by case number, or pinning priority chats, you can stay organized and responsive to customer needs.
